subparts.text: Explain the significance of job analysis in the hiring process. Provide an example of how job analysis can help a company ensure they hire the right candidate for a specific role 5
"An investment in training today leads to excellence tomorrow." Comment 5
“Manpower planning is essential for ensuring that an organization has the right people with the right skills at the right time” Discuss 5
In a rapidly changing business environment, discuss the role of HRM in helping organizations adapt to changes and maintain a competitive edge with special emphasis on contemporary trends today 5
“Job analysis is about job description and specification.” Discuss 5
Explain with example the sources of recruitment. 5
